title: Notes
changeFolderConfirmMessage: Switching to "{{path}}" will show notes from that folder instead. Your current notes stay on disk and aren't deleted.
empty: Global notes that persist across projects — write anytime, saved anytime.
tocEmpty: No headings in this note yet
folderHint: Stored directly in a folder on your computer, easy to maintain and manage.
conflictHint: This looks like a cloud-sync conflict copy. Open it to compare, then keep the version you want.
externalChanged: This note changed on disk while you were editing.
contentPlaceholder: Write anything — commands, snippets, ideas…  (Markdown supported)
